use_cases: User authentication with login and signup forms
Standardized button actions in form submissions
Reusable button component across authentication flows
Accessible form interactions with keyboard navigation support
ai_summary: A minimalist, accessible button component built with Radix UI and Tailwind CSS using class variance authority for variant management. Features standard button variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes for consistent styling across login and signup forms. Designed for integration in SaaS, fintech, and e-commerce authentication flows with proper focus-visible states and disabled state handling.
